settings.title: Preferences
settings.languageHint: Changes the language of menus and buttons. Pack content stays in the language its creator wrote it.

streamerMode.settingsDescription: Hides all viewer avatars, names, and comments so you can screen-share without exposing anyone. Reveal any item individually when you need to.

auth.acceptRules: I have read and accept the <link>Community Rules</link>.

rules.metaDescription: The community rules for creating and playing packs on Velanto — read them before you register.
rules.heading: Community Rules
rules.intro: These rules keep Velanto safe and fair for everyone. By creating an account you agree to follow them.
rules.loadError: We couldn't load the rules right now. Please try again in a moment.

banReason.label: Reason
banReason.detailRequired: Please add details for this ban.
banReason.loadError: Couldn't load ban reasons. Try again.

home.title: Discover packs
home.subtitle: Browse packs by format or tag, then play through one to see who comes out on top.
home.error: Couldn't load packs. Try again later.
home.empty: No packs match these filters yet.

pack.noPlays: No plays yet — be the first!

save_one.title: A group's pool appears
save_one.desc: Each round shows a group's items — a random sample, or all of them if the creator arranged them manually.

save_one.title: You save one
save_one.desc: Pick your single favorite; the rest are dropped for that round.

save_one.title: Next group, same deal
save_one.desc: One save per group, across every round — no going back to change a pick.

sacrifice_one.title: A group's pool appears
sacrifice_one.desc: Each round shows a group's items to choose between.

sacrifice_one.title: You sacrifice one
sacrifice_one.desc: Cut the one you like least; the others move on.

sacrifice_one.title: Next group, same deal
sacrifice_one.desc: One cut per round, across every group.

nxn.title: Two categories face off
nxn.desc: Each round pits items from two categories head-to-head.

nxn.title: Pick a side
nxn.desc: Choose the item you prefer in every matchup.

nxn.title: Picks tally up
nxn.desc: Your choices add up across all rounds to a final result.

rank_blind.title: Items appear one at a time
rank_blind.desc: You see each item blind, without knowing what comes next.

rank_blind.title: Place it in your ranking
rank_blind.desc: Slot each item into your growing ranked list as you go.

rank_blind.title: No do-overs
rank_blind.desc: Your ranking locks in once every item is placed.

1v1.title: Two items, head-to-head
1v1.desc: Every round is a straight one-versus-one matchup.

1v1.title: Pick the winner
1v1.desc: Choose your favorite of the two.

1v1.title: Winners tally up
1v1.desc: Results add up across every matchup.

pack.commentPlaceholder: Share your thoughts on this pack…
pack.loadCommentsError: Couldn't load comments. Try again later.
pack.loadMoreError: Couldn't load more comments. Try again.
pack.postErrorFallback: Couldn't post your comment. Try again.
pack.voteError: Couldn't record your vote. Try again.

play.loginRequired: You need to be logged in to play a pack.
play.instructionSave: Pick the one you'd save. Check it below, then confirm.
play.instructionSacrifice: Pick the one you'd sacrifice. Check it below, then confirm.
play.instructionNxn: Pick the side you'd save. Check it below, then confirm.
play.finishedSave: You saved {count, plural, one {# pick} other {# picks}}, one per round.
play.finishedSacrifice: You sacrificed {count, plural, one {# pick} other {# picks}}, one per round.
play.finishedVersus: You picked a side in {count, plural, one {# round} other {# rounds}} between {a} and {b}.
play.h2hSummary: Here's who beat who across {count, plural, one {# head-to-head} other {# head-to-heads}}.
play.rankInstruction: Choose where this one goes — item {current} of {total}
play.rankingDoneSummary: All {count, plural, one {# round} other {# rounds}} placed, blind.

result.label: Result
result.playsRecorded: {count, plural, one {# play recorded.} other {# plays recorded.}}
result.youPlaced: You placed this #{position} · {count, plural, one {# other play agreed} other {# other plays agreed}}
result.placed: Placed #{position} · {count, plural, one {# other play agreed} other {# other plays agreed}}
result.notInYourPlay: Not in your play this round
result.notInThisPlay: Not in this play this round

create.loginRequired: You need to be logged in to create a pack.
create.tagsSelected: {count, plural, one {# tag selected} other {# tags selected}}
create.blurbSaveOne: Show a group, keep one to advance.
create.blurbSacrificeOne: Remove one at a time; a favorite remains.
create.blurbNxn: Two categories compared side by side.
create.blurbRankBlind: Place each pick blind into a growing ranked list.
create.blurb1v1: Pick a winner in each head-to-head matchup.
